segments.text: A radiation machine gave one patient roughly
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: 100 times the intended dose.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The manufacturer said it was impossible.
Then it happened again.
The Therac-25 replaced physical safety
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: interlocks with software checks.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: During fast data entry, a race condition
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: could leave the machine in the wrong
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: state and fire a full power beam
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: with no filter.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Nobody caught it because the code had
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: been reused from older machines, and reused
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: code felt like tested code.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: Operators reported errors.
The manufacturer insisted the machine was
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: safe.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: More patients were burned before the pattern
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: was treated as real.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: The disaster was not just bad code.
It was a system with no independent
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: safety layer, no quick way to believe
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: field reports, and no design for software
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: being wrong.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: That is how small causes become massive
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay

segments.text: consequences.
segments.timing_adjustment_note: split from longer timed caption for phrase-level Shorts overlay
